response: Taylor Swift's *Midnights*, released in October 2022, is a 13-track pop/synth-pop album with a runtime of 44 minutes. The record made a massive impact upon arrival, selling 1.58 million copies in its first week and going on to amass 3.4 billion streams on Spotify. It was further cemented as a landmark release when it won the Grammy for Album of the Year.
